description: Structural contract for intent-report.md handoff artifacts (C2-handoff-schemas). The Intent phase captures user-stated goals + constraints before Scout begins.

required_first_line.fail_message: challenge token missing from line 1 — report may be a forgery

required_sections.name: goal
required_sections.fail_message: ## Goal (or ANCHOR:goal) missing — Intent must state the user-facing goal in one sentence

required_sections.name: constraints
required_sections.fail_message: ## Constraints (or ANCHOR:constraints) missing — Intent must enumerate scope limits and non-goals

required_sections.name: success_criteria
required_sections.fail_message: ## Success Criteria (or ANCHOR:success_criteria) missing — Intent must declare measurable done-conditions
